message:
🧹 Replace timeout magic numbers with named constants in OPA + compliance cards (#10115)

Replace 12 raw timeout literals across 4 card components with named constants
from lib/constants/network.ts (KUBECTL_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS, KUBECTL_MEDIUM_TIMEOUT_MS,
KUBECTL_EXTENDED_TIMEOUT_MS, METRICS_SERVER_TIMEOUT_MS) and file-scoped constants
(OPA_LIST_TIMEOUT_MS, OPA_CREATE_TIMEOUT_MS) for non-standard values.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
